emails.subject: Hard Lessons from California
emails.body: Hard Lessons from California Rob: Here's a quick and dirty list of some lessons from California that Alberta may not want to repeat. Steve, let me know if I've missed any messages we're using to describe California's woes (or mangled any, for that matter. If you have any questions, don't hestitate to get in touch. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: Hard Lessons from California
emails.body: Re: Hard Lessons from California Thanks Jeff. I'll go through this and likely follow up with you again. Rick Shapiro said he thought we had some powerpoint slides already prepared on our experience in California and that you would also be the resource for those. Is this right? If so please send them to me. Regards, Rob From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 11/17/2000 02:44 PM CST Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON
